# wellplayed_organization_app (Resource)

Manages a WellPlayed organization OAuth2 application. Backed by the `createOrganizationApp`, `updateOrganizationApp`, and `deleteOrganizationApp` mutations.

The `secret` is the OAuth2 client secret. The API returns it only when the app is created (or when the secret is reset out of band), so it is stored once at create time and never refreshed during Read; it is unavailable after import.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A confidential OAuth2 application. The client secret is generated by the API
# on creation and exposed as a sensitive computed attribute.
resource "wellplayed_organization_app" "web" {
  name        = "Acme Web"
  description = "Acme web application."
  icon        = "https://cdn.example.com/acme.png"

  redirect_urls        = ["https://play.example.com/auth/callback"]
  logout_redirect_urls = ["https://play.example.com/"]
  login_url            = "https://play.example.com/login"
  consent_url          = "https://play.example.com/consent"
  requires_consent     = true
}

# A public OAuth2 client (e.g. a SPA or mobile app) with no client secret.
resource "wellplayed_organization_app" "spa" {
  name        = "Acme SPA"
  description = "Acme single-page app."
  public      = true

  redirect_urls        = ["https://app.example.com/callback"]
  logout_redirect_urls = ["https://app.example.com/"]
  login_url            = "https://app.example.com/login"
  consent_url          = "https://app.example.com/consent"
  requires_consent     = false
}

# The generated client secret (confidential clients only).
output "web_client_secret" {
  value     = wellplayed_organization_app.web.secret
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `consent_url` (String) URL where users are redirected to grant consent.
- `description` (String) Description of the app.
- `login_url` (String) URL where users are redirected to log in.
- `logout_redirect_urls` (List of String) Allowed redirect URLs after logout.
- `name` (String) Display name of the app.
- `redirect_urls` (List of String) Allowed OAuth2 redirect URLs after authorization.
- `requires_consent` (Boolean) Whether the app requires explicit user consent during authorization.

### Optional

- `icon` (String) App icon URL.
- `public` (Boolean) Whether this is a public OAuth2 client (no client secret required). Defaults to the server's choice when omitted. Changing it forces a new app.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) When the app was created (RFC 3339).
- `creator_id` (String) ID of the account that created this app.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the app, which is also the OAuth2 client ID.
- `organization_id` (String) ID of the organization that owns this app.
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) OAuth2 client secret. Returned only when the app is created; not refreshed during Read and unavailable after import.
- `updated_at` (String) When the app was last updated (RFC 3339).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Organization apps are imported by their ID (the OAuth2 client ID). The client
# secret is returned only on creation, so it is not available after import.
terraform import wellplayed_organization_app.web app_01h...
```
